title: Inventory informal settlement and health access data
outcome: A dated source inventory separating settlement-boundary maps, population data, health-facility data, and unusable sources.
validation_method: Reviewer checks each source for URL, methodology, grain, and limitations.

title: Map informal settlement boundaries for candidate cities
outcome: A settlement-boundary map for at least two LMIC cities with accuracy documentation.
validation_method: Replicator validates boundaries against alternative data sources and confirms accuracy.
done_condition: Boundary map with accuracy assessment and replication.

title: Map health-facility access gaps in informal settlements
outcome: An access-gap map comparing settlement and non-settlement health-facility access.
validation_method: Replicator confirms gap methodology and equity comparison.
done_condition: Gap map includes equity comparison and replication.

title: Red-team misuse of settlement maps
outcome: Failure-mode review identifying eviction and stigmatization risks.
validation_method: Mitigations confirmed or publication blocked, then replicated.
done_condition: Claims qualified or gated with anti-eviction safeguards.

title: Check whether outputs match urban health planning needs
outcome: A field-facing review of whether gap maps change urban health planning responsibly.
expected_artifact: playbooks.md update with use and non-use guidance.
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies decision, user, misuse risk, then replicated.
done_condition: Named user, named decision, non-use cases, replicated field-reality review.
